description: Count the ribs and determine the vertebral level of the pre-placed 'Nodule' fiducial on the provided chest CT. Check for anatomical variants including cervical, lumbar, or bifid ribs. Place reference fiducials at the centers of the T1, T6, and T12 vertebral bodies. Save the fiducials to ~/Documents/SlicerData/LIDC/vertebral_landmarks.mrk.json and export a report to ~/Documents/SlicerData/LIDC/rib_count_report.json with the following fields: total_rib_pairs, first_rib_identified, twelfth_rib_identified, anatomical_variants (cervical_rib, lumbar_rib, bifid_rib, bifid_rib_level), nodule_vertebral_level, and confidence.
